TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Likavung ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 466 buwan, 1,247 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 857 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 390 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Puyuma 54%, Amis 7%, Paywan 3%, Bunun 1%, Rukay 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Likavung hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Likavung hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Likavung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Likavung hya' ga llyung. qalang Likavung ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. tay mkraya' na Likavung hya' ga Tamalakaw. tay mkyahu' na Likavung hya' ga Taromak. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Likavung ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lika*uŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pujuma **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. qalaŋ lika*uŋ ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. taj mkrajaʔ na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tamalakaw. taj mkjaħuʔ na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa taromak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ lika*uŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Likavung ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 466 buwan, 1,247 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 857 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 390 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Puyuma 54%, Amis 7%, Paywan 3%, Bunun 1%, Rukay 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Likavung hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Likavung hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Likavung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Likavung hya' ga llyung. qalang Likavung ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. tay mkraya' na Likavung hya' ga Tamalakaw. tay mkyahu' na Likavung hya' ga Taromak. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Likavung ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lika*uŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pujuma **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. qalaŋ lika*uŋ ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. taj mkrajaʔ na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tamalakaw. taj mkjaħuʔ na lika*uŋ ħjaʔ ɣa taromak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ lika*uŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
